text: gai ko bukhar hai kaunsi sui lagaun
pichli baar wali laal bottle fir de du kya
doctor dur hai dawa ka naam batao
dawa ke baad doodh kab bech sakte hain
doodh me khoon hai ghar me use kar sakte kya
pet tight hai aur saans tez hai
hara chara ke baad pait ful gaya tel pilau
bachda atka hai zor se kheenchu kya
kai pashu ek sath muh aur khur chhale ke sath beemar hain
mara hua pashu ka meat kha sakte hai kya
kutte ne gai ko kaata bachchon ko paas jane du kya
spray wala chara khane ke baad pashu kamp raha hai
bhains saans nahi le pa rahi aur gir gayi
ghav me keede hain raakh laga du kya
bachda doodh nahi pee raha aur bahut sust hai
bakre ka peshab band hai aur pet dard hai
gai fit jaisa gir gir rahi hai aur kamp rahi hai
garmi me pashu gir gaya aur paani nahi pee raha
shed clean kaise rakhe
bail ko garmi me paani break kaise de
gai thoda kam kha rahi hai kya check karu
paani kam pi rahi hai par khadi normal hai
photo se disease confirm kar sakte ho kya
delivery ke baad bakri khana nahi kha rahi daant pis rahi aur doodh kam hai
gale me chara atak gaya pani wapas aa raha aur laar aa rahi
bhains ka gobar kala badbu wala hai bukhar aur khana kam hai
gaay heat me nahi aa rahi hormone injection ya desi dawa de sakte kya
antibiotic injection ke baad doodh bachcho ko pila sakte hain kya
